headline: Is It Time To Reassess IBM (IBM) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether International Business Machines at around US$243 per share still offers value, the key is understanding what that price actually reflects. The stock has returned 0.7% over the last 7 days and 1.6% over the last 30 days, while the year to date return of negative 16.6% sits in contrast to its 104.0% 3 year and 130.3% 5 year returns. Recent headlines around International Business Machines have focused on its positioning within large scale enterprise technology and...

headline: First-Ever 'Masters at Madison Square Park' Watch Party Tee'd Up for April 9-12
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) will host the first-of-its-kind 'Masters at Madison Square Park' immersive viewing experience for all four days of the Masters Tournament, Thursday, April 9 – Sunday, April 12. Fans in New York City will have the exclusive opportunity to play a replicated iconic hole on an AI-powered golf simulator and watch the action unfold with live viewing of the Tournament all weekend long. Limited edition merchandise and specialty themed food and beverage items are part of this experience,

headline: Full Sail University to Open IBM Cyber Defense Range Powered by AWS and Cloud Range on Campus

headline: A Look At IBM (IBM) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
summary: Recent performance context for International Business Machines International Business Machines (IBM) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a small positive move over the past month and a negative return over the past 3 months and year to date. Over the past year, the total return is close to flat. This contrasts with stronger total returns over the past 3 and 5 years and may prompt investors to recheck how the current share price aligns with personal expectations. See our latest...
